sentences.target: Je change la couche du bébé.

translations.fr: Je change la couche du bébé.
translations.es: Estoy cambiando el pañal del bebé.
translations.de: Ich wechsle dem Baby die Windel.
translations.it: Sto cambiando il pannolino del bambino.
translations.pt: Estou trocando a fralda do bebê.
translations.vi: Tôi đang thay tã cho em bé.
translations.nl: Ik verschoon de luier van de baby.
translations.hi: मैं बच्चे का डायपर बदल रहा हूँ.
translations.ja: 赤ちゃんのおむつを替えています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun; subject of the verb 'change'.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive action applied to 'la couche'.
Definite article, feminine singular, determiners the noun 'couche'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'change'; here denotes a baby's diaper.
Preposition 'de' contracted with 'le' (de+le); introduces the genitive/possessive complement 'bébé'.
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of the preposition 'du'.

sentences.target: Mets une couche de peinture, s'il te plaît.
sentences.reading: /mɛ yn kuʃ də pɛ̃tyʁ, sil tə plɛ/

translations.fr: Mets une couche de peinture, s'il te plaît.
translations.ipa: /mɛ yn kuʃ də pɛ̃tyʁ, sil tə plɛ/
translations.en: Put a layer of paint, please.
translations.es: Aplica una capa de pintura, por favor.
translations.de: Bitte trag eine Schicht Farbe auf.
translations.it: Metti una mano di vernice, per favore.
translations.pt: Aplica uma camada de tinta, por favor.
translations.vi: Vui lòng sơn một lớp sơn.
translations.ar: من فضلك ضع طبقة من الطلاء.
translations.nl: Breng alsjeblieft een laag verf aan.
translations.hu: Kérlek, vigyél fel egy réteg festéket.
translations.el: Σε παρακαλώ, βάλε ένα χέρι μπογιά.
translations.nb: Vennligst påfør ett lag med maling.
translations.sv: Snälla, lägg på ett lager färg.
translations.ro: Te rog, aplică un strat de vopsea.
translations.fi: Ole hyvä ja levitä yksi kerros maalia.
translations.ja: ペンキを一度塗ってください。

tokens.explanation: Imperative, 2nd person singular; directive to apply 'une couche de peinture'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determines 'couche'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'Mets'.
Preposition introducing the material/type complement 'peinture'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'de'.
Subordinating conjunction 'si' elided before the vowel in 'il'; introduces the conditional clause of the polite formula.
3rd person singular subject pronoun of 'plaît'.
2nd person singular clitic pronoun, indirect object (dative) of 'plaît'.
Verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; part of the fixed polite expression 's'il te plaît'.

sentences.target: On ajoute une couche quand il fait froid.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ aʒut yn kuʃ kɑ̃ il fɛ fʁwa/

translations.fr: On ajoute une couche quand il fait froid.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ aʒut yn kuʃ kɑ̃ il fɛ fʁwa/
translations.en: We add a layer when it's cold.
translations.es: Cuando hace frío, nos ponemos una capa más.
translations.de: Wenn es kalt ist, ziehen wir eine Schicht mehr an.
translations.it: Quando fa freddo, mettiamo un altro strato.
translations.ko: 추울 때는 옷을 한 겹 더 껴입어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 天冷的时候我们会多穿一层。
translations.yue: 凍嘅時候我哋會多著一層衫。
translations.ru: Когда холодно, мы надеваем ещё один слой одежды.
translations.pt: Quando está frio, colocamos mais uma camada de roupa.
translations.tr: Hava soğuk olduğunda bir kat daha giyiyoruz.
translations.vi: Khi trời lạnh, chúng tôi mặc thêm một lớp.
translations.ar: عندما يكون الجو بارداً، نرتدي طبقة إضافية.
translations.nl: Als het koud is, trekken we een extra laag aan.
translations.uk: Коли холодно, ми надягаємо ще один шар одягу.
translations.hu: Ha hideg van, felveszünk még egy réteget.
translations.hi: ठंड होने पर हम एक परत और पहनते हैं.
translations.pl: Gdy jest zimno, zakładamy dodatkową warstwę.
translations.el: Όταν κάνει κρύο, φοράμε ένα ακόμα στρώμα.
translations.nb: Når det er kaldt, tar vi på et ekstra lag.
translations.id: Saat cuaca dingin, kami memakai satu lapis lagi.
translations.sv: När det är kallt tar vi på ett lager till.
translations.ro: Când e frig, mai punem un strat de haine.
translations.cs: Když je zima, oblékáme si další vrstvu.
translations.da: Når det er koldt, tager vi på et ekstra lag.
translations.fi: Kun on kylmä, puemme vielä yhden kerroksen.
translations.ja: 寒いときはもう一枚重ねて着ます。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (generic/colloquial 'we'); triggers 3rd person singular agreement.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular (with 'on'); action of adding.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determines 'couche'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'ajoute'.
Subordinating conjunction introducing a temporal clause ('il fait froid').
3rd person singular subject pronoun of 'fait'; in weather expressions used impersonally.
Verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; used in the weather expression 'il fait froid'.
Adjective functioning as predicative complement in the impersonal weather phrase.

sentences.target: Il y a une couche de crème.
sentences.reading: /il i a yn kuʃ də kʁɛm/

translations.fr: Il y a une couche de crème.
translations.ipa: /il i a yn kuʃ də kʁɛm/
translations.en: There is a layer of cream.
translations.nb: Det er et lag med krem.
translations.ja: クリームの層があります。

tokens.explanation: Expletive subject pronoun in the existential construction 'il y a'.
Adverbial/locative pronoun within 'il y a'; contributes the 'there' component.
Verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; forms the existential 'there is/are'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determines 'couche'.
Common noun, feminine singular; logical subject of the existential clause, syntactically the direct object of 'a'.
Preposition introducing the substance/type complement 'crème'.
Common noun, feminine singular; complement of 'de'.

Il y a une couche de crème.
